goal: Align the desktop sidebar workflow order with the canonical FE v6 mockup and UX_SPEC without changing release GO state.
head: 006cc89
docs_root_resolution: User requested current repo docs; /home/firewine/getbeta/docs protocol copy is reference-only for this checkout.
blocked_scope: Changing backend/API/DB/schema behavior, source scripts, release readiness acceptance criteria, packet verifier criteria, or no-fake endpoint checks
Generating, inventing, copying, or promoting real adapter, endpoint, benchmark, package, export, release, or external evidence into the repository
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Committing model weights, strict model cache files, adapter artifacts, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, generated venv content, or Docker layers
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: Only align FE v6 sidebar workflow order with UX_SPEC and canonical mockup, add focused tests/evidence/docs, and preserve all release GO claims as false.
required_commands: rg -n -- "workflow order|Hardware.*Define.*Data|FE_V6|release_claimed_go: false|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint|M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO" artifacts/review/fe_v6_evidence.md artifacts/review/fe_v6_workflow_order_alignment.md docs/WORKING.md docs/plans/2026-05-09_COMPLETION_LOG.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: PABCD contract is valid JSON and includes mode=development plus phase notes for plan, audit, build, check, and done.
Desktop workflow step order matches UX_SPEC/canonical v6 order: Project/Workbench, Hardware, Define, Data, Train, Benchmark, Package, Export.
Focused app model test verifies the workflow order.
FE v6 browser smoke verifies visible sidebar order and route contract interactions.
Strict m1-smoke bootstrap no longer reports toolchain mismatch.
No M6-RC or v0 release GO claim is made.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "workflow order|Hardware.*Define.*Data|FE_V6|release_claimed_go: false|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint|M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO" artifacts/review/fe_v6_evidence.md artifacts/review/fe_v6_workflow_order_alignment.md docs/WORKING.md docs/plans/2026-05-09_COMPLETION_LOG.md .codex/tasks/current.json

source_gap.ux_spec_order: Dashboard/Workbench, Hardware Doctor, Define, Data, Train, Benchmark, Package, Export
source_gap.previous_app_order: Project, Define, Data, Hardware, Train, Benchmark, Package, Export
source_gap.impact: Sidebar workflow order did not match the canonical v6 mockup/UX workflow ordering.

frontend_alignment.current_app_order: Workbench, Hardware, Define, Data, Train, Benchmark, Package, Export

warnings: This phase changes FE workflow ordering and tests only.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO until accepted real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.

phase_notes.plan: Use UX_SPEC and canonical v6 mockup as the source for sidebar workflow order.
phase_notes.audit: Existing app already implements FE v6 route contract behavior, but workflowSteps orders Hardware after Data while the v6 workflow places Hardware before Define/Data.
phase_notes.build: Move Hardware before Define/Data in workflowSteps, add focused unit/e2e checks, and update FE evidence/working docs.
phase_notes.check: Run task JSON validation, strict m1-smoke bootstrap, frontend unit tests, FE v6 browser smoke, build, evidence search, status, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: Verification passed, workflow order is aligned with FE v6, and release GO claims remain false.

pabcd.approved_scope: Align FE v6 sidebar workflow order with canonical mockup/UX_SPEC and update focused tests/evidence/docs.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No backend/API/schema/script/M6 review/release evidence changes; no release GO claim; no generated model cache, adapter, Docker, endpoint, evidence bundle, packet artifact, recertification artifact, or venv artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: After verification passes, stage, commit, push over SSH, and refresh origin/main tracking.
